query: SELECT id, worker_id, event_type, event_time FROM attendance_events WHERE worker_id = (SELECT id FROM workers WHERE code = 're') AND DATE(event_time) = CURDATE() ORDER BY event_time DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT id, worker_id, event_type, event_time FROM attendance_events WHERE worker_id = (SELECT id FROM workers WHERE code = 're') AND DATE(event_time) = CURDATE() ORDER BY event_time DESC LIMIT 5;
